Title: Yatta! Kore ga chijô saikyô no konbi da!
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Hiromi Tsuru, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: Hoping to force Son Goku into following his orders, Raditz abducts Gohan. While Goku and the others decide what to do next, Piccolo shows up. Realizing that Raditz is too powerful for either fighter to defeat alone, Son Goku and P...
